specific_mechanism: Snake venom toxins evolve under selection from prey resistance; population-level resistance drives toxin diversification at faster than neutral rate, producing characteristic dN/dS signatures
llm_application: LLM jailbreak co-evolution: as defenders patch jailbreak prompts, attackers diversify under selection; track 'dN/dS analog' on prompt-template mutations to predict next attack class.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes herpetology phase-coherence mapping as proposed.
